<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--langchain"></a>

# LangChain

Here we have some code snippets that help compare a vanilla code implementation
with LangChain and Apache Hamilton.

LangChain’s focus is on hiding details and making code terse.

Apache Hamilton’s focus instead is on making code more readable, maintainable, and importantly customizeable.

So don’t be surprised that Apache Hamilton’s code is “longer” - that’s by design. There is
also little abstraction between you, and the underlying libraries with Apache Hamilton.
With LangChain they’re abstracted away, so you can’t really see easily what’s going on
underneath.

*Rhetorical question*: which code would you rather maintain, change, and update?

<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--a-simple-joke-example"></a>

## A simple joke example

<table class="docutils align-left" id="id1">
<caption><span>Simple Invocation</span></caption>
<thead>
<tr><th><p>Apache Hamilton</p></th>
<th><p>Vanilla</p></th>
<th><p>LangChain</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><div><div><pre><span></span><span># hamilton_invoke.py</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>List</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>llm_client</span><span>()</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>f</span><span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{</span><span>topic</span><span>}</span><span>"</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_messages</span><span>(</span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span> <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>joke_prompt</span><span>}]</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_response</span><span>(</span><span>llm_client</span><span>:</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>,</span>
                  <span>joke_messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>llm_client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>joke_messages</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>message</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>hamilton_invoke</span>

    <span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>driver</span>

    <span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_invoke</span><span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>display_all_functions</span><span>(</span><span>"hamilton-invoke.png"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>([</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
                     <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>List</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>prompt_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span>
<span>client</span> <span>=</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>call_chat_model</span><span>(</span><span>messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>messages</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>message</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>invoke_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>prompt_value</span> <span>=</span> <span>prompt_template</span><span>.</span><span>format</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>=</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>messages</span> <span>=</span> <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span> <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>prompt_value</span><span>}]</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>call_chat_model</span><span>(</span><span>messages</span><span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>invoke_chain</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.output_parsers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.prompts</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.runnables</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_openai</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span>

<span>prompt</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span><span>.</span><span>from_template</span><span>(</span>
    <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
<span>output_parser</span> <span>=</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span><span>()</span>
<span>model</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>)</span>
<span>chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>model</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>
<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>chain</span><span>.</span><span>invoke</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[![Structure of the Hamilton DAG](assets/images/hamilton-invoke_e086d9938a2f0c32.png)](assets/images/hamilton-invoke_e086d9938a2f0c32.png)

The Hamilton DAG visualized.

<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--a-streamed-joke-example"></a>

## A streamed joke example

With Apache Hamilton we can just swap the call function to return a streamed response.
Note: you could use @config.when to include both streamed and non-streamed versions in the same DAG.

<table class="docutils align-left" id="id3">
<caption><span>Streamed Version</span></caption>
<thead>
<tr><th><p>Apache Hamilton</p></th>
<th><p>Vanilla</p></th>
<th><p>LangChain</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><div><div><pre><span></span><span># hamilton_streamed.py</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>Iterator</span><span>,</span> <span>List</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>llm_client</span><span>()</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>f</span><span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{</span><span>topic</span><span>}</span><span>"</span>
    <span>)</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_messages</span><span>(</span>
        <span>joke_prompt</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span>
             <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>joke_prompt</span><span>}]</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_response</span><span>(</span>
        <span>llm_client</span><span>:</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>,</span>
        <span>joke_messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>Iterator</span><span>[</span><span>str</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>stream</span> <span>=</span> <span>llm_client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>joke_messages</span><span>,</span>
        <span>stream</span><span>=</span><span>True</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>for</span> <span>response</span> <span>in</span> <span>stream</span><span>:</span>
        <span>content</span> <span>=</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>delta</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>
        <span>if</span> <span>content</span> <span>is</span> <span>not</span> <span>None</span><span>:</span>
            <span>yield</span> <span>content</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>hamilton_streaming</span>
    <span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>driver</span>

    <span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_streaming</span><span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>display_all_functions</span><span>(</span>
        <span>"hamilton-streaming.png"</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>result</span> <span>=</span> <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
        <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
        <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>for</span> <span>chunk</span> <span>in</span> <span>result</span><span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>]:</span>
        <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>chunk</span><span>,</span> <span>end</span><span>=</span><span>""</span><span>,</span> <span>flush</span><span>=</span><span>True</span><span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>List</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>Iterator</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>prompt_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span>
<span>client</span> <span>=</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>stream_chat_model</span><span>(</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>Iterator</span><span>[</span><span>str</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>stream</span> <span>=</span> <span>client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>messages</span><span>,</span>
        <span>stream</span><span>=</span><span>True</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>for</span> <span>response</span> <span>in</span> <span>stream</span><span>:</span>
        <span>content</span> <span>=</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>delta</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>
        <span>if</span> <span>content</span> <span>is</span> <span>not</span> <span>None</span><span>:</span>
            <span>yield</span> <span>content</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>stream_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>Iterator</span><span>[</span><span>str</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>prompt_value</span> <span>=</span> <span>prompt_template</span><span>.</span><span>format</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>=</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>stream_chat_model</span><span>(</span>
        <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span> <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>prompt_value</span><span>}])</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>for</span> <span>chunk</span> <span>in</span> <span>stream_chain</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>):</span>
        <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>chunk</span><span>,</span> <span>end</span><span>=</span><span>""</span><span>,</span> <span>flush</span><span>=</span><span>True</span><span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_openai</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.prompts</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.output_parsers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span>

<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.runnables</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span>

<span>prompt</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span><span>.</span><span>from_template</span><span>(</span>
    <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span>
<span>)</span>
<span>output_parser</span> <span>=</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span><span>()</span>
<span>model</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>)</span>
<span>chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>model</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>'__main__'</span><span>:</span>
    <span>for</span> <span>chunk</span> <span>in</span> <span>chain</span><span>.</span><span>stream</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>):</span>
        <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>chunk</span><span>,</span> <span>end</span><span>=</span><span>""</span><span>,</span> <span>flush</span><span>=</span><span>True</span><span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[![Structure of the Hamilton DAG](assets/images/hamilton-streamed_b0c489df83699d98.png)](assets/images/hamilton-streamed_b0c489df83699d98.png)

The Hamilton DAG visualized.

<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--a-batch-parallel-joke-example"></a>

## A “batch” parallel joke example

In this batch example, the joke requests are parallelized.
Note: with Apache Hamilton you can delegate to many different backends for parallelization, e.g. Ray, Dask, etc. We use multi-threading here.

<table class="docutils align-left" id="id5">
<caption><span>Batch Parallel Version</span></caption>
<thead>
<tr><th><p>Apache Hamilton</p></th>
<th><p>Vanilla</p></th>
<th><p>LangChain</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><div><div><pre><span></span><span># hamilton_batch.py</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>List</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton.execution</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>executors</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton.htypes</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>Collect</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton.htypes</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>Parallelizable</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>llm_client</span><span>()</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>topic</span><span>(</span>
        <span>topics</span><span>:</span> <span>list</span><span>[</span><span>str</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>Parallelizable</span><span>[</span><span>str</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>for</span> <span>_topic</span> <span>in</span> <span>topics</span><span>:</span>
        <span>yield</span> <span>_topic</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>f</span><span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{</span><span>topic</span><span>}</span><span>"</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_messages</span><span>(</span>
        <span>joke_prompt</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span>
             <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>joke_prompt</span><span>}]</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_response</span><span>(</span><span>llm_client</span><span>:</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>,</span>
                  <span>joke_messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>llm_client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>joke_messages</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>message</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_responses</span><span>(</span>
        <span>joke_response</span><span>:</span> <span>Collect</span><span>[</span><span>str</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>str</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>list</span><span>(</span><span>joke_response</span><span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>hamilton_batch</span>

    <span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>driver</span>

    <span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_batch</span><span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>enable_dynamic_execution</span><span>(</span>
            <span>allow_experimental_mode</span><span>=</span><span>True</span>
        <span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_remote_executor</span><span>(</span>
            <span>executors</span><span>.</span><span>MultiThreadingExecutor</span><span>(</span><span>5</span><span>)</span>
        <span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>display_all_functions</span><span>(</span><span>"hamilton-batch.png"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"joke_responses"</span><span>],</span>
            <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span>
                <span>"topics"</span><span>:</span> <span>[</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>,</span>
                           <span>"spaghetti"</span><span>,</span>
                           <span>"dumplings"</span><span>]</span>
            <span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>

    <span># can still run single chain with overrides</span>
    <span># and getting just one response</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
            <span>overrides</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"lettuce"</span><span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>concurrent.futures</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ThreadPoolExecutor</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>List</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>prompt_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span>
<span>client</span> <span>=</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>call_chat_model</span><span>(</span><span>messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>messages</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>message</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>invoke_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>prompt_value</span> <span>=</span> <span>prompt_template</span><span>.</span><span>format</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>=</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>messages</span> <span>=</span> <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span>
                 <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>prompt_value</span><span>}]</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>call_chat_model</span><span>(</span><span>messages</span><span>)</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>batch_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topics</span><span>:</span> <span>list</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>list</span><span>:</span>
    <span>with</span> <span>ThreadPoolExecutor</span><span>(</span><span>max_workers</span><span>=</span><span>5</span><span>)</span> <span>as</span> <span>executor</span><span>:</span>
        <span>return</span> <span>list</span><span>(</span>
            <span>executor</span><span>.</span><span>map</span><span>(</span><span>invoke_chain</span><span>,</span> <span>topics</span><span>)</span>
        <span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>batch_chain</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>,</span> <span>"spaghetti"</span><span>,</span> <span>"dumplings"</span><span>]</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.output_parsers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.prompts</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.runnables</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_openai</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span>

<span>prompt</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span><span>.</span><span>from_template</span><span>(</span>
    <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
<span>output_parser</span> <span>=</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span><span>()</span>
<span>model</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>)</span>
<span>chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>model</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>
<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>chain</span><span>.</span><span>batch</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>,</span>
             <span>"spaghetti"</span><span>,</span>
             <span>"dumplings"</span><span>]</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[![Structure of the Hamilton DAG](assets/images/hamilton-batch_da0212810237d7be.png)](assets/images/hamilton-batch_da0212810237d7be.png)

The Hamilton DAG visualized.

<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--a-async-joke-example"></a>

## A “async” joke example

Here we show how to make the joke using async constructs. With Apache Hamilton
you can mix and match async and regular functions, the only change
is that you need to use the async Hamilton Driver.

<table class="docutils align-left" id="id7">
<caption><span>Async Version</span></caption>
<thead>
<tr><th><p>Apache Hamilton</p></th>
<th><p>Vanilla</p></th>
<th><p>LangChain</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><div><div><pre><span></span><span># hamilton_async.py</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>List</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>llm_client</span><span>()</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>AsyncOpenAI</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>AsyncOpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>f</span><span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{</span><span>topic</span><span>}</span><span>"</span>
    <span>)</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_messages</span><span>(</span>
        <span>joke_prompt</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span>
             <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>joke_prompt</span><span>}]</span>

<span>async</span> <span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_response</span><span>(</span>
        <span>llm_client</span><span>:</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>AsyncOpenAI</span><span>,</span>
        <span>joke_messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>await</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>llm_client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
            <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
            <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>joke_messages</span><span>,</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>message</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>asyncio</span>

    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>hamilton_async</span>

    <span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>base</span>
    <span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>async_driver</span>

    <span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>async_driver</span><span>.</span><span>AsyncDriver</span><span>(</span>
        <span>{},</span>
        <span>hamilton_async</span><span>,</span>
        <span>result_builder</span><span>=</span><span>base</span><span>.</span><span>DictResult</span><span>()</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>display_all_functions</span><span>(</span><span>"hamilton-async.png"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>loop</span> <span>=</span> <span>asyncio</span><span>.</span><span>get_event_loop</span><span>()</span>
    <span>result</span> <span>=</span> <span>loop</span><span>.</span><span>run_until_complete</span><span>(</span>
        <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
            <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>result</span><span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>List</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>prompt_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span>
<span>client</span> <span>=</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>async_client</span> <span>=</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>AsyncOpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>async</span> <span>def</span><span> </span><span>acall_chat_model</span><span>(</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>await</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>async_client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
            <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
            <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>messages</span><span>,</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>message</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>

<span>async</span> <span>def</span><span> </span><span>ainvoke_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>prompt_value</span> <span>=</span> <span>prompt_template</span><span>.</span><span>format</span><span>(</span>
        <span>topic</span><span>=</span><span>topic</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>messages</span> <span>=</span> <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span>
                 <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>prompt_value</span><span>}]</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>await</span> <span>acall_chat_model</span><span>(</span><span>messages</span><span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>asyncio</span>

    <span>loop</span> <span>=</span> <span>asyncio</span><span>.</span><span>get_event_loop</span><span>()</span>
    <span>result</span> <span>=</span> <span>loop</span><span>.</span><span>run_until_complete</span><span>(</span>
        <span>ainvoke_chain</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>result</span><span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.output_parsers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.prompts</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.runnables</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_openai</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span>

<span>prompt</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span><span>.</span><span>from_template</span><span>(</span>
    <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
<span>output_parser</span> <span>=</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span><span>()</span>
<span>model</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>)</span>
<span>chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>model</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>
<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>asyncio</span>
    <span>loop</span> <span>=</span> <span>asyncio</span><span>.</span><span>get_event_loop</span><span>()</span>
    <span>result</span> <span>=</span> <span>loop</span><span>.</span><span>run_until_complete</span><span>(</span>
        <span>chain</span><span>.</span><span>ainvoke</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>result</span><span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[![Structure of the Hamilton DAG](assets/images/hamilton-async_3f38edd833a53771.png)](assets/images/hamilton-async_3f38edd833a53771.png)

The Hamilton DAG visualized.

<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--switch-llm-to-completion-for-joke"></a>

## Switch LLM to completion for joke

Here we show how to make the joke switching to a different openAI model that is for completion.
Note: we use the @config.when construct to augment the original DAG and add a new function
that uses the different OpenAI model.

<table class="docutils align-left" id="id9">
<caption><span>Completion Version</span></caption>
<thead>
<tr><th><p>Apache Hamilton</p></th>
<th><p>Vanilla</p></th>
<th><p>LangChain</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><div><div><pre><span></span><span># hamilton_completion.py</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>typing</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>List</span>

<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton.function_modifiers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>config</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>llm_client</span><span>()</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>f</span><span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{</span><span>topic</span><span>}</span><span>"</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_messages</span><span>(</span>
        <span>joke_prompt</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>]:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>[{</span><span>"role"</span><span>:</span> <span>"user"</span><span>,</span>
             <span>"content"</span><span>:</span> <span>joke_prompt</span><span>}]</span>

<span>@config</span><span>.</span><span>when</span><span>(</span><span>type</span><span>=</span><span>"completion"</span><span>)</span>
<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_response__completion</span><span>(</span>
        <span>llm_client</span><span>:</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>,</span>
        <span>joke_prompt</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>llm_client</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>prompt</span><span>=</span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>text</span>

<span>@config</span><span>.</span><span>when</span><span>(</span><span>type</span><span>=</span><span>"chat"</span><span>)</span>
<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_response__chat</span><span>(</span>
        <span>llm_client</span><span>:</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>,</span>
        <span>joke_messages</span><span>:</span> <span>List</span><span>[</span><span>dict</span><span>])</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>llm_client</span><span>.</span><span>chat</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>messages</span><span>=</span><span>joke_messages</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>message</span><span>.</span><span>content</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>hamilton_completion</span>

    <span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>driver</span>

    <span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_completion</span><span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_config</span><span>({</span><span>"type"</span><span>:</span> <span>"completion"</span><span>})</span>
        <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>display_all_functions</span><span>(</span>
        <span>"hamilton-completion.png"</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
            <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>

    <span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_completion</span><span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_config</span><span>({</span><span>"type"</span><span>:</span> <span>"chat"</span><span>})</span>
        <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>display_all_functions</span><span>(</span><span>"hamilton-chat.png"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
            <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>prompt_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span>
<span>client</span> <span>=</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>call_llm</span><span>(</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>client</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>prompt</span><span>=</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>text</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>invoke_llm_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>prompt_value</span> <span>=</span> <span>prompt_template</span><span>.</span><span>format</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>=</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>call_llm</span><span>(</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>invoke_llm_chain</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.output_parsers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.prompts</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.runnables</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_openai</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>OpenAI</span>

<span>prompt</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span><span>.</span><span>from_template</span><span>(</span>
    <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
<span>output_parser</span> <span>=</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span><span>()</span>
<span>llm</span> <span>=</span> <span>OpenAI</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct"</span><span>)</span>
<span>llm_chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>llm</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>llm_chain</span><span>.</span><span>invoke</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[![Structure of the Hamilton DAG](assets/images/hamilton-completion_39b9019eb2874950.png)](assets/images/hamilton-completion_39b9019eb2874950.png)

The Hamilton DAG visualized with configuration provided for the completion path. Note the dangling node - that’s normal, it’s not used in the completion path.

<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--switch-to-using-anthropic"></a>

## Switch to using Anthropic

Here we show how to make the joke switching to use a different model provider, in this case
it’s Anthropic.
Note: we use the @config.when construct to augment the original DAG and add a new functions
to use Anthropic.

<table class="docutils align-left" id="id11">
<caption><span>Anthropic Version</span></caption>
<thead>
<tr><th><p>Apache Hamilton</p></th>
<th><p>Vanilla</p></th>
<th><p>LangChain</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><div><div><pre><span></span><span># hamilton_anthropic.py</span>
<span>import</span><span> </span><span>anthropic</span>
<span>import</span><span> </span><span>openai</span>

<span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton.function_modifiers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>config</span>

<span>@config</span><span>.</span><span>when</span><span>(</span><span>provider</span><span>=</span><span>"openai"</span><span>)</span>
<span>def</span><span> </span><span>llm_client__openai</span><span>()</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>()</span>

<span>@config</span><span>.</span><span>when</span><span>(</span><span>provider</span><span>=</span><span>"anthropic"</span><span>)</span>
<span>def</span><span> </span><span>llm_client__anthropic</span><span>()</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>anthropic</span><span>.</span><span>Anthropic</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>anthropic</span><span>.</span><span>Anthropic</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>"Human:</span><span>\n\n</span><span>"</span>
        <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>\n\n</span><span>"</span>
        <span>"Assistant:"</span>
    <span>)</span><span>.</span><span>format</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>=</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>

<span>@config</span><span>.</span><span>when</span><span>(</span><span>provider</span><span>=</span><span>"openai"</span><span>)</span>
<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_response__openai</span><span>(</span>
        <span>llm_client</span><span>:</span> <span>openai</span><span>.</span><span>OpenAI</span><span>,</span>
        <span>joke_prompt</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>llm_client</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>prompt</span><span>=</span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>choices</span><span>[</span><span>0</span><span>]</span><span>.</span><span>text</span>

<span>@config</span><span>.</span><span>when</span><span>(</span><span>provider</span><span>=</span><span>"anthropic"</span><span>)</span>
<span>def</span><span> </span><span>joke_response__anthropic</span><span>(</span>
        <span>llm_client</span><span>:</span> <span>anthropic</span><span>.</span><span>Anthropic</span><span>,</span>
        <span>joke_prompt</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>llm_client</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"claude-2"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>prompt</span><span>=</span><span>joke_prompt</span><span>,</span>
        <span>max_tokens_to_sample</span><span>=</span><span>256</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>completion</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>hamilton_invoke_anthropic</span>

    <span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>driver</span>

    <span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_invoke_anthropic</span><span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_config</span><span>({</span><span>"provider"</span><span>:</span> <span>"anthropic"</span><span>})</span>
        <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>display_all_functions</span><span>(</span>
        <span>"hamilton-anthropic.png"</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
        <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
        <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>

    <span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
        <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_invoke_anthropic</span><span>)</span>
        <span>.</span><span>with_config</span><span>({</span><span>"provider"</span><span>:</span> <span>"openai"</span><span>})</span>
        <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
            <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>import</span><span> </span><span>anthropic</span>

<span>prompt_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span>
<span>anthropic_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>f</span><span>"Human:</span><span>\n\n</span><span>{</span><span>prompt_template</span><span>}</span><span>\n\n</span><span>Assistant:"</span>
<span>anthropic_client</span> <span>=</span> <span>anthropic</span><span>.</span><span>Anthropic</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>call_anthropic</span><span>(</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>anthropic_client</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"claude-2"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>prompt</span><span>=</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>,</span>
        <span>max_tokens_to_sample</span><span>=</span><span>256</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>completion</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>invoke_anthropic_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>prompt_value</span> <span>=</span> <span>anthropic_template</span><span>.</span><span>format</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>=</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>call_anthropic</span><span>(</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>invoke_anthropic_chain</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.output_parsers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.prompts</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.runnables</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_community.chat_models</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatAnthropic</span>

<span>prompt</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span><span>.</span><span>from_template</span><span>(</span>
    <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
<span>output_parser</span> <span>=</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span><span>()</span>
<span>anthropic</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatAnthropic</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"claude-2"</span><span>)</span>
<span>anthropic_chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>anthropic</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>anthropic_chain</span><span>.</span><span>invoke</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[![Structure of the Hamilton DAG](assets/images/hamilton-anthropic_42bff36dba263fb2.png)](assets/images/hamilton-anthropic_42bff36dba263fb2.png)

The Hamilton DAG visualized with configuration provided to use Anthropic.

<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--logging"></a>

## Logging

Here we show how to log more information about the joke request. Apache Hamilton has
lots of customization options, and one out of the box is to log more information via
printing.

<table class="docutils align-left" id="id13">
<caption><span>Logging</span></caption>
<thead>
<tr><th><p>Apache Hamilton</p></th>
<th><p>Vanilla</p></th>
<th><p>LangChain</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><div><div><pre><span></span><span># run.py</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>driver</span><span>,</span> <span>lifecycle</span>
<span>import</span><span> </span><span>hamilton_anthropic</span>

<span>dr</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
    <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_anthropic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>.</span><span>with_config</span><span>({</span><span>"provider"</span><span>:</span> <span>"anthropic"</span><span>})</span>
    <span># we just need to add this line to get things printing</span>
    <span># to the console; see DAGWorks for a more off-the-shelf</span>
    <span># solution.</span>
    <span>.</span><span>with_adapters</span><span>(</span><span>lifecycle</span><span>.</span><span>PrintLn</span><span>(</span><span>verbosity</span><span>=</span><span>2</span><span>))</span>
    <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
<span>)</span>
<span>print</span><span>(</span>
    <span>dr</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
        <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
        <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
    <span>)</span>
<span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>import</span><span> </span><span>anthropic</span>

<span>prompt_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span>
<span>anthropic_template</span> <span>=</span> <span>f</span><span>"Human:</span><span>\n\n</span><span>{</span><span>prompt_template</span><span>}</span><span>\n\n</span><span>Assistant:"</span>
<span>anthropic_client</span> <span>=</span> <span>anthropic</span><span>.</span><span>Anthropic</span><span>()</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>call_anthropic</span><span>(</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>response</span> <span>=</span> <span>anthropic_client</span><span>.</span><span>completions</span><span>.</span><span>create</span><span>(</span>
        <span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"claude-2"</span><span>,</span>
        <span>prompt</span><span>=</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>,</span>
        <span>max_tokens_to_sample</span><span>=</span><span>256</span><span>,</span>
    <span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>response</span><span>.</span><span>completion</span>

<span>def</span><span> </span><span>invoke_anthropic_chain_with_logging</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>f</span><span>"Input: </span><span>{</span><span>topic</span><span>}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>prompt_value</span> <span>=</span> <span>anthropic_template</span><span>.</span><span>format</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>=</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>f</span><span>"Formatted prompt: </span><span>{</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>output</span> <span>=</span> <span>call_anthropic</span><span>(</span><span>prompt_value</span><span>)</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>f</span><span>"Output: </span><span>{</span><span>output</span><span>}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
    <span>return</span> <span>output</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>invoke_anthropic_chain_with_logging</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.output_parsers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.prompts</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.runnables</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_community.chat_models</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatAnthropic</span>

<span>prompt</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span><span>.</span><span>from_template</span><span>(</span>
    <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
<span>output_parser</span> <span>=</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span><span>()</span>
<span>anthropic</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatAnthropic</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"claude-2"</span><span>)</span>
<span>anthropic_chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>anthropic</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>import</span><span> </span><span>os</span>
    <span>os</span><span>.</span><span>environ</span><span>[</span><span>"LANGCHAIN_API_KEY"</span><span>]</span> <span>=</span> <span>"..."</span>
    <span>os</span><span>.</span><span>environ</span><span>[</span><span>"LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2"</span><span>]</span> <span>=</span> <span>"true"</span>
    <span># it's hard to customize the logging output of langchain</span>
    <span># so here's their way to try to make money from you!</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>anthropic_chain</span><span>.</span><span>invoke</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="code-comparisons-langchain--fallbacks"></a>

## Fallbacks

Fallbacks are pretty situation and context dependent. It’s not that
hard to wrap a function in a try/except block. The key is to make sure
you know what’s going on, and that a fallback was triggered. So in our
opinion it’s better to be explicit about it.

<table class="docutils align-left" id="id14">
<caption><span>Logging</span></caption>
<thead>
<tr><th><p>Apache Hamilton</p></th>
<th><p>Vanilla</p></th>
<th><p>LangChain</p></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><div><div><pre><span></span>
<span>import</span><span> </span><span>hamilton_anthropic</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>hamilton</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>driver</span>

<span>anthropic_driver</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
    <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_anthropic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>.</span><span>with_config</span><span>({</span><span>"provider"</span><span>:</span> <span>"anthropic"</span><span>})</span>
    <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
<span>)</span>
<span>openai_driver</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>driver</span><span>.</span><span>Builder</span><span>()</span>
    <span>.</span><span>with_modules</span><span>(</span><span>hamilton_anthropic</span><span>)</span>
    <span>.</span><span>with_config</span><span>({</span><span>"provider"</span><span>:</span> <span>"openai"</span><span>})</span>
    <span>.</span><span>build</span><span>()</span>
<span>)</span>
<span>try</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>anthropic_driver</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
            <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
<span>except</span> <span>Exception</span><span>:</span>
    <span># this is the current way to do fall backs</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span>
        <span>openai_driver</span><span>.</span><span>execute</span><span>(</span>
            <span>[</span><span>"joke_response"</span><span>],</span>
            <span>inputs</span><span>=</span><span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>"ice cream"</span><span>}</span>
        <span>)</span>
    <span>)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>def</span><span> </span><span>invoke_chain_with_fallback</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>:</span> <span>str</span><span>)</span> <span>-&gt;</span> <span>str</span><span>:</span>
    <span>try</span><span>:</span>
        <span>return</span> <span>invoke_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>  <span># noqa: F821</span>
    <span>except</span> <span>Exception</span><span>:</span>
        <span>return</span> <span>invoke_anthropic_chain</span><span>(</span><span>topic</span><span>)</span>  <span># noqa: F821</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>'__main__'</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>invoke_chain_with_fallback</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
<td><div><div><pre><span></span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.output_parsers</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.prompts</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_core.runnables</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_community.chat_models</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatAnthropic</span>
<span>from</span><span> </span><span>langchain_community.chat_models</span><span> </span><span>import</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span>

<span>prompt</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatPromptTemplate</span><span>.</span><span>from_template</span><span>(</span>
    <span>"Tell me a short joke about </span><span>{topic}</span><span>"</span><span>)</span>
<span>output_parser</span> <span>=</span> <span>StrOutputParser</span><span>()</span>
<span>anthropic</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatAnthropic</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"claude-2"</span><span>)</span>
<span>anthropic_chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>anthropic</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>
<span>model</span> <span>=</span> <span>ChatOpenAI</span><span>(</span><span>model</span><span>=</span><span>"gpt-3.5-turbo"</span><span>)</span>
<span>chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>(</span>
    <span>{</span><span>"topic"</span><span>:</span> <span>RunnablePassthrough</span><span>()}</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>prompt</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>model</span>
    <span>|</span> <span>output_parser</span>
<span>)</span>

<span>fallback_chain</span> <span>=</span> <span>chain</span><span>.</span><span>with_fallbacks</span><span>([</span><span>anthropic_chain</span><span>])</span>

<span>if</span> <span>__name__</span> <span>==</span> <span>"__main__"</span><span>:</span>
    <span>print</span><span>(</span><span>fallback_chain</span><span>.</span><span>invoke</span><span>(</span><span>"ice cream"</span><span>))</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

# Airflow ¶

[
<svg viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<path></path>
</svg>

Back to top](#code-comparisons-airflow)

[
<svg><use href="#svg-eye"></use></svg>

View this page](https://github.com/apache/hamilton/blob/main/docs/code-comparisons/airflow.rst?plain=true "View this page")

[
<svg><use href="#svg-pencil"></use></svg>

Edit this page](https://github.com/apache/hamilton/edit/main/docs/code-comparisons/airflow.rst "Edit this page")

<svg><use href="#svg-toc"></use></svg>

<a id="code-comparisons-airflow--airflow"></a>

# Airflow

For more details see this [Apache Hamilton + Airflow blog post](https://blog.dagworks.io/p/supercharge-your-airflow-dag-with).

**TL;DR:**

1. Apache Hamilton complements Airflow. It’ll help you write better, more modular, and testable code.
2. Apache Hamilton does not replace Airflow.

<a id="code-comparisons-airflow--high-level-differences:"></a>

## High-level differences:

- Apache Hamilton is a micro-orchestator. Airflow is a macro-orchestrator.
- Apache Hamilton is a Python library standardizing how you express python pipelines, while Airflow is a complete platform and
  system for scheduling and executing pipelines.
- Apache Hamilton focuses on providing a lightweight, low dependency, flexible way to define data pipelines as Python functions,
  whereas Airflow is a whole system that comes with a web-based UI, scheduler, and executor.
- Apache Hamilton pipelines are defined using pure Python code, that can be run anywhere that Python runs. While Airflow uses
  Python to describe a DAG, this DAG can only be run by the Airflow system.
- Apache Hamilton complements Airflow, and you can use Apache Hamilton within Airflow. But the reverse is not true.
- You can use Apache Hamilton directly in a Jupyter Notebook, or Python web-service. You can’t do this with Airflow.

<a id="code-comparisons-airflow--code-examples:"></a>

## Code examples:

Looking at the two examples below, you can see that Apache Hamilton is a more lightweight and flexible way to define data pipelines.
There is no scheduling information, etc required to run the code because Apache Hamilton runs the pipeline in the same process as the
caller. This makes it easier to test and debug pipelines. Airflow, on the other hand, is a complete system for scheduling and
executing pipelines. It is more complex to set up and run. Note: If you stuck the contents of run.py in a function within
the example\_dag.py, the Apache Hamilton pipeline could be used in the Airflow PythonOperator!

<a id="code-comparisons-airflow--apache-hamilton:"></a>

### Apache Hamilton:

The below code here shows how you can define a simple data pipeline using Apache Hamilton. The pipeline consists of three functions
that are executed in sequence. The pipeline is defined in a module called pipeline.py, and then executed in a separate
script called run.py, which imports the pipeline module and executes it.

```
# pipeline.py def raw_data () -> list [int ]:return [1,2,3] def processed_data (raw_data:list [int ]) -> list [int ]:return [x * 2 for x in data] def load_data (process_data:list [int ],client:SomeClient) -> dict:metadata =client.send_data (process_data) return metadata # run.py -- this is the script that executes the pipeline import pipeline from hamilton import driver dr =driver.Builder ().with_modules (pipeline).build () metadata =dr.execute (['load_data' ],inputs =dict (client =SomeClient ()))
```

<a id="code-comparisons-airflow--airflow:"></a>

### Airflow:

The below code shows how you can define the same pipeline using Airflow. The pipeline consists of three tasks that are executed
in sequence. The entire pipeline is defined in a module called example\_dag.py, and then executed by the Airflow scheduler.

```
# example_dag.py from airflow import DAG from airflow.operators.python_operator import PythonOperator from datetime import datetime,timedelta default_args ={'owner':'airflow','depends_on_past':False,'start_date':datetime (2023,1,1 ),'email_on_failure':False,'email_on_retry':False,'retries':1,'retry_delay':timedelta (minutes =5 ),} dag =DAG ('example_dag',default_args =default_args,description ='A simple DAG',schedule_interval =timedelta (days =1 ),) def extract_data ():return [1,2,3] def transform_data (data ):return [x * 2 for x in data] def load_data (data ):client =SomeClient () client.send_data (data) extract_task =PythonOperator (task_id ='extract_data',python_callable =extract_data,dag =dag,) transform_task =PythonOperator (task_id ='transform_data',python_callable =transform_data,op_args =['{{ ti.xcom_pull(task_ids="extract_data") }}' ],dag =dag,) load_task =PythonOperator (task_id ='load_data',python_callable =load_data,op_args =['{{ ti.xcom_pull(task_ids="transform_data") }}' ],dag =dag,) extract_task >> transform_task >> load_task
```

On this page

- [Airflow](#code-comparisons-airflow)
  - [High-level differences:](#code-comparisons-airflow--high-level-differences)
  - [Code examples:](#code-comparisons-airflow--code-examples)
    - [Apache Hamilton:](#code-comparisons-airflow--apache-hamilton)
    - [Airflow:](#code-comparisons-airflow--id1)

<a id="asf-downloads--downloads"></a>

# Downloads

Official Apache Hamilton releases are available at the Apache Software Foundation distribution site.

<a id="asf-downloads--release-downloads"></a>

## Release Downloads

All releases can be found at: <https://downloads.apache.org/incubator/hamilton/>

Each release includes:

- Source distributions (.tar.gz, .zip)
- Checksums (SHA512)
- Digital signatures (.asc)

<a id="asf-downloads--verifying-releases"></a>

## Verifying Releases

To verify the integrity of downloaded files, you can:

1. Verify the checksum matches the published SHA512 sum
2. Verify the GPG signature using the KEYS file available at the downloads site

<a id="asf-downloads--release-history"></a>

## Release History

Visit the [downloads directory](https://downloads.apache.org/incubator/hamilton/) to see all available releases.

<a id="asf-downloads--installation"></a>

## Installation

After downloading and verifying a release, you can install it using pip:

```
pip install apache-hamilton-<version>.tar.gz
```

Or install directly from PyPI:

```
pip install apache-hamilton
```

For more information about installation options, see the [Get Started guide](#get-started).

<a id="asf-downloads--official-releases"></a>

## Official Releases

The following are the official Apache Hamilton releases:

- **1.89.0** (2025-10-11) - First Apache Hamilton release

  - [Source (tar.gz)](https://downloads.apache.org/incubator/hamilton/1.89.0/apache-hamilton-1.89.0-incubating.tar.gz)
  - [Checksums](https://downloads.apache.org/incubator/hamilton/1.89.0/apache-hamilton-1.89.0-incubating.tar.gz.sha512)
  - [Signature](https://downloads.apache.org/incubator/hamilton/1.89.0/apache-hamilton-1.89.0-incubating.tar.gz.asc)

On this page
